ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "daylight_savings" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location observes daylight savings */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "islamic_region" TEXT /* Islamic region (e.g., Makkah, Madinah) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prayer_times" (
  "prayer_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prayer time entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the prayer times are calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the prayer times are valid */,
  "fajr" TEXT /* Fajr prayer time */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Sunrise time */,
  "dhuhr" TEXT /* Dhuhr prayer time */,
  "asr" TEXT /* Asr prayer time */,
  "maghrib" TEXT /* Maghrib prayer time */,
  "isha" TEXT /* Isha prayer time */,
  "zawal" TEXT /* Zawal time */,
  "midsun" TEXT /* Midsun time */,
  "midnight" TEXT /* Midnight time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prayer_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_times_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin, mosque admin) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "islamic_school" TEXT /* Islamic school of thought (e.g., Hanafi, Shafi'i, Maliki, Hanbali) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred location */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for the user */,
  "notification_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if notifications are enabled */,
  "notification_time_before_prayer" INTEGER /* Time in minutes before prayer to send notifications */,
  "prayer_calculation_method" TEXT /* Method for calculating prayer times (e.g., Muslim World League, Islamic Society of North America) */,
  "timezone_override" TEXT /* Override for user's timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mosques" (
  "mosque_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mosque */,
  "mosque_name" TEXT /* Name of the mosque */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the mosque is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the mosque */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the mosque */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the mosque */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the mosque */,
  "imam_name" TEXT /* Name of the imam */,
  "masjid_type" TEXT /* Type of masjid (e.g., Sunni, Shia, non-denominational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mosque_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mosques_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "mosque_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mosque where the event is scheduled */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is public or private */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., prayer, lecture, conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_mosque_id FOREIGN KEY ("mosque_id") REFERENCES mosques ("mosque_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., registered, attended, canceled) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the event */,
  "attendance_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., prayer time, event reminder) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback (e.g., bug report, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prayer_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prayer reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the reminder */,
  "prayer_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prayer time entry */,
  "reminder_time_before_prayer" INTEGER /* Time in minutes before prayer to send the reminder */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reminder is active */,
  "reminder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the reminder (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_reminders_prayer_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("prayer_time_id") REFERENCES prayer_times ("prayer_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prayer_time_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical prayer time entry */,
  "prayer_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prayer time entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the prayer times are valid */,
  "fajr" TEXT /* Fajr prayer time */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Sunrise time */,
  "dhuhr" TEXT /* Dhuhr prayer time */,
  "asr" TEXT /* Asr prayer time */,
  "maghrib" TEXT /* Maghrib prayer time */,
  "isha" TEXT /* Isha prayer time */,
  "zawal" TEXT /* Zawal time */,
  "midsun" TEXT /* Midsun time */,
  "midnight" TEXT /* Midnight time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_time_history_prayer_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("prayer_time_id") REFERENCES prayer_times ("prayer_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., user engagement, prayer time usage) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the role expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, view prayer times) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., boolean, integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "islamic_dates" (
  "islamic_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Islamic date entry */,
  "gregorian_date" TEXT /* Gregorian date corresponding to the Islamic date */,
  "hijri_date" TEXT /* Hijri date */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the Islamic month */,
  "day_of_month" INTEGER /* Day of the Islamic month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("islamic_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prayer_time_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the adjustment applies */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the adjustment applies */,
  "prayer_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prayer time entry being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the adjustment in minutes */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., forward, backward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_time_adjustments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_time_adjustments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayer_time_adjustments_prayer_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("prayer_time_id") REFERENCES prayer_times ("prayer_time_id")
)
